narrative:
Mississinawa Valley Local Sd (Darke) school district has 2,239 registered voters, with 61.6% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 29.3% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 9.0%, a pronounced Republican lean of 20.3 percentage points.
